textByHash.20a9ffcf189dbaf83c39f051ca6fbc624a3c4e01: Hello there. The name's Keith. I'm the farmer here.
textByHash.9ac98877fcaef81f9e91090ff9e8cf058d95ee23: It's a peaceful life. Out here I can avoid the drama and politics of the big settlements.
textByHash.c63dae5c8a108235a3b2f996ccd1b785c39e999c: The Shayzien troops keep them busy. They've not tried coming up this way.
